topic: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)

sections.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Wish/If only + subject + past simple (present regret) | Wish/If only + subject + past perfect (past regret). Rules: 'Wish/If only' + past simple expresses a wish about present unreal situations | 'Wish/If only' + past perfect expresses regret about past events (things that didn't happen) | 'Wish/If only' + would + base verb expresses wanting someone else to change behavior | 'If only' is stronger/more emotional than 'wish'
sections.formula: Wish/If only + subject + past simple (present regret) | Wish/If only + subject + past perfect (past regret)

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
examples.english: I wish I had more money.

examples.hindi: काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
examples.english: If only I had more money.

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मैं वहाँ होता।
examples.english: I wish I were there.

examples.hindi: काश मैंने पहले पढ़ाई की होती।
examples.english: If only I had studied earlier.

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मैंने यह गलती नहीं की होती।
examples.english: I wish I had not made this mistake.

examples.hindi: काश तुम शांत हो जाओ।
examples.english: I wish you would calm down.

sections.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Wish/If only + subject + past simple (present regret) | Wish/If only + subject + past perfect (past regret)

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मैं उड़ सकता।
examples.english: I wish I could fly.

examples.hindi: काश मौसम अच्छा होता।
examples.english: If only the weather were good.

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मैंने उससे बात की होती।
examples.english: I wish I had talked to him.

examples.hindi: काश मुझे यह पहले पता होता।
examples.english: If only I had known this earlier.

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा समय होता।
examples.english: I wish I had more time.

examples.hindi: काश तुम मुझे सुनो।
examples.english: I wish you would listen to me.

sections.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Office & Professional Usage

sections.explanation: Practice Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Wish/If only + subject + past simple (present regret) | Wish/If only + subject + past perfect (past regret)

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मैं यह decision न लेता।
examples.english: I wish I had not taken this decision.

examples.hindi: काश हम फिर से मिल पाते।
examples.english: If only we could meet again.

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मैं और मेहनत करता।
examples.english: I wish I worked harder.

examples.hindi: काश उसने मुझे माफ़ कर दिया होता।
examples.english: If only he had forgiven me.

sections.title: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire). Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Wish/If only + subject + past simple (present regret) | Wish/If only + subject + past perfect (past regret)

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मैं यह भाषा जानता।
examples.english: I wish I knew this language.

examples.hindi: काश तुम धीरे बोलो।
examples.english: I wish you would speak slowly.

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मैंने वह मौका लिया होता।
examples.english: I wish I had taken that opportunity.

examples.hindi: काश हम वहाँ न जाते।
examples.english: If only we had not gone there.
